sky.f1.uk.title: British F1 GP Highlights

sky.f1.uk.title: Dutch F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out in Zandvoort. Pipping his team mate to pole, Oscar Piastri leads Lando Norris as Max Verstappen looks to spring a surprise from P3 with Isack Hadjar for company. (31.08)

sky.f1.uk.title: Italian F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out at Monza. Max Verstappen holds pole from title contenders Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri as Charles Leclerc leads the Ferrari charge with Lewis Hamilton down in P10. (07.09)

sky.f1.uk.title: Azerbaijan F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: In Baku, Max Verstappen leads a mixed-up starting grid with Carlos Sainz and Liam Lawson in podium contention. Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri bid to come through the field. (21.09)

sky.f1.uk.title: Singapore F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out at Marina Bay Circuit for the 2025 Singapore Grand Prix. George Russell claims Mercedes' second pole of the season, with Max Verstappen starting in second. (05.10)

sky.f1.uk.title: US F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out for the United States Grand Prix. A growing threat in the title fight, Max Verstappen has pole from Lando Norris as championship leader Oscar Piastri starts in P6. (19.10)

sky.f1.uk.title: Mexico City F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out in Mexico City. Lando Norris aims to capitalise on a big opening in the title race as the Ferraris of Charles Leclerc and Lewis Hamilton round out the top three. (26.10)

sky.f1.uk.title: Sao Paulo F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out at Interlagos. An opportunity presents itself to poleman Lando Norris in the title chase with Oscar Piastri starting P4 and Max Verstappen way down the grid. (09.11)

sky.f1.uk.title: Las Vegas F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: As the lights go out on the Strip for the Las Vegas Grand Prix, championship leader Lando Norris starts from P1 with Max Verstappen behind. Oscar Piastri lines up in fifth place. (23.11)

sky.f1.uk.title: Qatar F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out in Qatar. As Lando Norris lines up in P2 a win away from the world championship, it's down to polesitter Oscar Piastri and Max Verstappen to deny the Brit the title. (30.11)

sky.f1.uk.title: Abu Dhabi F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out for the title decider. Starting behind polesitter Max Verstappen, Lando Norris will become world champion with a podium. Oscar Piastri has it all to do from third. (07.12)

sky.mix.uk.title: PGA Tour Champions Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: Tournament highlights from the Chubb Classic - a PGA Tour Champions event held at Tiburon Golf Club in Naples, Florida. The 1997 Open winner Justin Leonard won this event last year.

sky.mix.uk.title: Live NFL: The Insiders
sky.mix.uk.description: Real-time, breaking National Football League news covering all 32 teams as it happens with the most connected sources in the sport.

sky.mix.uk.title: Spanish F1 GP Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: It's an all-papaya front row as McLaren lead the way with Oscar Piastri from Lando Norris. Max Verstappen and George Russell form the second row, while Lewis Hamilton starts P5. (01.06)

sky.mix.uk.title: Canadian F1 GP Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: It's lights out for the Canadian Grand Prix as George Russell and Max Verstappen line-up alongside each other at the front with Oscar Piastri in third. Lando Norris comes from P7. (15.06)

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 09/10: Sheff Utd v Sheff Weds
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic clash from the English Football League. Here, Sheffield United and Sheffield Wednesday meet in a thrilling Steel City derby in September 2009.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 10/11: Peterborough v So'ton
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic clash from the English Football League. Here, Peterborough and Southampton meet in an eight-goal thriller in League 1 in February 2011.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 12/13: Watford v Leicester
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic clash from the English Football League. Here, Watford meet Leicester City in the famous second leg of their Championship play-off semi-final in May 2013.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 13/14: Sheff Weds v Leeds Utd
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive a classic match from the Football League. Here, Yorkshire rivals Sheffield Wednesday and Leeds United meet at Hillsborough in January 2014 in a memorable game for the Owls.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: Clinching the fifth of her eight Miami Open titles, Serena Williams would have to overcome one of her great rivals Justine Henin as the pair met in a highly anticipated 2007 final.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: Saving four match points in the process, Roger Federer was pushed to the limit in his 2014 ATP Finals semi-final meeting with fellow Swiss superstar Stan Wawrinka.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 13/14: Derby County v N.Forest
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic clash from the English Football League. Here, Derby County meet Nottingham Forest in the Sky Bet Championship.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 13/14: QPR v N. Forest
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive a classic match from the English Football League. Here, QPR host Nottingham Forest at Loftus Road in the 2013-14 season in a seven-goal thriller.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 14/15: Brentford v Fulham
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, a west London derby in the Sky Bet Championship between Brentford and Fulham at Griffin Park in November 2014.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 14/15: Derby County v N.Forest
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic English Football League action. Here, a Midlands derby in the Sky Bet Championship between Derby County and Nottingham Forest at the iPro Stadium in January 2015.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 14/15: Norwich v Ipswich
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive some classic action from the EFL. Here, Norwich City and Ipswich Town clash in an East Anglian derby at Carrow Road back in March 2015.

sky.mix.uk.title: S/Lge: Bradford v Catalans
sky.mix.uk.description: Impressing on their Betfred Super League return, Bradford Bulls go up against French outfit Catalans Dragons next. Catalans got off the mark with a strong home win over Huddersfield Giants.

sky.mix.uk.title: PGA Tour Golf Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: The concluding day of the PGA Tour's Genesis Invitational at the Riviera Country Club. Last year, Ryder Cup star Ludvig Åberg claimed victory. (22.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: In a three-hour test of wills, Justine Henin was bidding to close an up-and-down year with the defence of her WTA Finals title against Maria Sharapova in 2007.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: In a match that would decide the 2016 year-end world number one, Andy Murray - looking to cap a storybook season at The O2 in London - met rival Novak Djokovic at the ATP Finals.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP Final: Delray Beach
sky.mix.uk.description: A men's singles champion is crowned in the final of the Delray Beach Open. (21.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest:Watford/Liverpool 2015
sky.mix.uk.description: Watford: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. Here, for Watford, the 3-0 win over Liverpool at Vicarage Road in December 2015.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:WHU/Man Utd '16
sky.mix.uk.description: West Ham: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. Here, for West Ham, their 3-2 win over Man Utd in their final game at Upton Park.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:Wigan/Arsenal'10
sky.mix.uk.description: Wigan: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. Here, for Wigan Athletic, their late comeback 3-2 win over Arsenal in April 2010.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest:Arsenal/Wimbledon 1997
sky.mix.uk.description: Wimbledon: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. Here, for Wimbledon, their 1-0 victory over Arsenal back in February 1997.

sky.mix.uk.title: World Cup C': Hull KR v Brisbane
sky.mix.uk.description: In a clash of champions, Hull's MKM Stadium sees the Betfred Super League-winning Robins take on NRL Premiers Brisbane Broncos in the 2026 Betfred World Club Challenge.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP Tour This Week
sky.mix.uk.description: Step behind the scenes of men's professional tennis throughout the 2026 season on the ATP Tour with special features, interviews and much more.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Darts: Glasgow
sky.mix.uk.description: The BetMGM Premier League visits Glasgow for night three of the season as Luke Humphries plays Josh Rock, while on Scottish soil, Welshman Gerwyn Price and Jonny Clayton collide.

sky.mix.uk.title: Elise Christie: No Filter
sky.mix.uk.description: In December 2021, three-time Olympian Elise Christie retired from short track speed skating, broken and unwell. Elise tells her story in this Sky Sports New Focus Fund documentary.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:Arsenal/Hull '08
sky.mix.uk.description: Hull: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. Here, for Hull City, the famous 2-1 away win at Arsenal back in September 2008.

E4Plus1.uk.description: Adam Spielberg: Adam writes an original script about Indiana Jones, but his passion for directing is challenged when he films it. Barry and Murray make a wager. (S5 Ep15)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Stuck in a Moment: Haley wants to give the family a Christmas gift they'll never forget - if she can find the perfect time. Claire is mad when Phil borrows the Christmas tree. (S10 Ep10)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: A Moving Day: Claire and Phil aren't convinced that Haley and Dylan can make it on their own when they move them into their new apartment before the baby arrives. (S10 Ep11)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Hot Potato Café: The Hot Potato Café in Philadelphia has never made a profit. When the chips are down, can Gordon help save the restaurant? (S3 Ep1)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Flamangos: Gordon visits Flamangos in rural New Jersey, where mother and daughter Adele and Cheryl are stuck in their tropical ways. But their restaurant is far from paradise. (S3 Ep2)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Bureau: Pimento's life is still in peril, so Captain Holt calls on an old friend in the FBI to help identify the crooked agent who tried to have him killed. (S3 Ep22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Greg and Larry: The squad drop everything when they realise that Holt is in danger as the search for Pimento's hitman takes an unexpected turn. (S3 Ep23)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: In Marge We Trust: Homer discovers that a Japanese dishwashing powder company is using his face as its logo. And Marge dishes out advice to the church's parishioners. (S8 Ep22/25)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Homer's Enemy: A new power plant employee who's struggled to build a decent life is incensed that someone as foolish as Homer could seem so affluent. Bart buys a factory. (S8 Ep23/25)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: You Got Zuko'd: Adam's girlfriend Jackie returns from her summer in New York but acts like a different person. Beverly is unhappy with Lainey's culinary skills. (S6 Ep2)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Rad!: Erica thinks her singing dreams have come true when she lands a job at a new karaoke bar in town. Murray teaches Barry and Lainey financial responsibility. (S6 Ep3)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Can't Elope: Haley and Dylan's plan to quietly elope before the babies are born does not go as hoped. Jay tries to get his new business off the ground by courting an Insta celeb. (S10 Ep20)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Commencement: Cam finally gets a chance to shine when he's asked to preside over the high school graduation ceremony at the last minute, while Jay gives the commencement address. (S10 Ep21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Overmining: Peralta and Holt help CJ with a big, problematic case. Jeffords tells Gina to remove her precious portable heater from the office. (S4 Ep9)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Captain Latvia: Boyle enlists Peralta's help to track down his son's favourite toy for Christmas. The team face their rivals in the annual carol competition. (S4 Ep10)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Great Money Caper: When Homer leaves Bart by the squid port, kind strangers start giving money to the 'street urchin'. So Homer and Bart turn to a life of scamming. (S12 Ep7/21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Skinner's Sense of Snow: When a huge snowdrift engulfs the school, Bart leads the kids in a rebellion, gagging Principal Skinner and tying him to a chair as they run amok. (S12 Ep8/21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Full Heart, Empty Pool: Grampa and Homer accidentally invent a new sport while arguing in a drained pool. But trouble arrives when Big Avocado sponsors it. (S36 Ep17)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Lisa the Veterinarian: Lisa is inspired to become a vet and begins an internship at a local surgery. Marge gets a job as a crime scene cleaner but finds it traumatic. (S27 Ep15/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off...
E4Plus1.uk.description: ...for Stand Up To Cancer: Tan France, Caroline Quentin, Joel Dommett and Johanna Konta take on classic éclairs and puff pastry, and recreate their biggest fears in cake form. (S3 Ep3)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: Britain's sharpest armchair critics watch The Masked Dancer, Married at First Sight UK, Nadiya's Everyday Baking, Bad Sisters and This Is MY House. (S20 Ep1)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Goggleboxers watch the Queen's funeral, The Masked Dancer, Frozen Planet II, Bad Sisters, The Grand Tour: A Scandi Flick and Secret Crush. (S20 Ep3)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Dating Naked UK
E4Plus1.uk.description: Winning Connections: It's the final, and the final three couples set about proving their connections - and disproving others' - to win the £50,000 prize. (S1 Ep10)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Naked Attraction
E4Plus1.uk.description: Twitch streamer Fi gets likes all day but struggles to make a connection in real life. Bondage-lover Elle is after a sophisticated silver fox who's dirty in the bedroom. (S10 Ep4)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: Britain's sharpest armchair critics watch The Masked Dancer, Married at First Sight UK, Nadiya's Everyday Baking, Bad Sisters and This Is MY House. (S20 Ep1) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Goggleboxers watch the Queen's funeral, The Masked Dancer, Frozen Planet II, Bad Sisters, The Grand Tour: A Scandi Flick and Secret Crush. (S20 Ep3)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Homr: When Homer loses all the family's money with an unwise investment, he becomes a human guinea pig to earn some cash - and that's when he becomes extremely intelligent... (S12 Ep9/21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Dungeons & Dragons, Anyone?: Adam picks a team of popular athletes over his friends in gym class. Erica decides that she wants to leave home to go to college. (S3 Ep20)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Rush: When Barry insists that Beverly always favours Adam, she tries to make amends. Murray's not happy about Erica's new boyfriend, a fanatical music fan. (S3 Ep21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Smother's Day: Beverly's upset when Barry and Erica forget to buy her a Mother's Day present and make some last-minute 'Mom Coupons' instead. (S3 Ep22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Don't Tell the Bride
E4Plus1.uk.description: The One with the Wight Wedding: Groom Liam wants a wedding day that celebrates his homeland, the Isle of Wight. Bride Kandi wants a more standard day. Will it be all-white or go all wrong?

E4Plus1.uk.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
E4Plus1.uk.description: Cheeky original clips featuring ducks going up an escalator, animal impressions, a few narrow escapes on a snowboard and rally driving. Plus: an energy drink house prank and a butcher rap.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Putting Down Roots: Dede's husband Jerry comes to town to bequeath her possessions to the family. Mitch and Claire receive a little more of Dede than they know what to do with. (S10 Ep9)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Stuck in a Moment: Haley wants to give the family a Christmas gift they'll never forget - if she can find the perfect time. Claire is mad when Phil borrows the Christmas tree. (S10 Ep10)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
E4Plus1.uk.description: A short, cheeky clip featuring animals and food, from the always hilarious Tube that is Rude.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Hot Potato Café: The Hot Potato Café in Philadelphia has never made a profit. When the chips are down, can Gordon help save the restaurant? (S3 Ep1) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Flamangos: Gordon visits Flamangos in rural New Jersey, where mother and daughter Adele and Cheryl are stuck in their tropical ways. But their restaurant is far from paradise. (S3 Ep2) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Scrunchie Rule: Beverly nurses Coach Mellor back to health after a slip-up with rope-climbing equipment. Erica and her roommate begin to annoy each other. (S5 Ep16)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Colors: Barry tries to break up Beverly's social group to get more of her attention. Adam attempts to trick Murray into loving the theatre. (S5 Ep17)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Blasts from the Past: Phil and Claire decide to take a cycling tour through Italy before becoming grandparents, and Dylan introduces them to his mum, who has an interesting past. (S10 Ep12)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Whanex?: While preparing a presentation for his students about future goals, Cam must contend with a bully at the school. Jay has technical trouble during a video conference. (S10 Ep13)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Bazzini: Award-winning chef Paul runs Italian joint Bazzini in New Jersey, but didn't realise how difficult running a restaurant would be. Can Gordon turn it around? (S3 Ep3)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Mojito: Gordon Ramsay visits a Cuban café in Brooklyn, where owners Marcelo and Kata fight over everything, driving away customers with their high-volume bickering. (S3 Ep4)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Coral Palms (Part 1/3): Peralta and Holt adjust to their lives in the Witness Protection Programme while crime boss Jimmy 'The Butcher' Figgis is still at large. (S4 Ep1)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Coral Palms (Part 2/3): Jimmy Figgis sees Peralta and Holt's video and comes looking for them. A new captain takes over the precinct, but is he up to the job? (S4 Ep2)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Simpsons Spin-Off Showcase: Troy McClure hosts a vision of the future of The Simpsons, in which Chief Wiggum becomes private detective Wiggum, P.I. (S8 Ep24/25)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Secret War of Lisa Simpson: Bart and Lisa enrol in military school, but Lisa finds it hard to fit in. Guest starring Willem Dafoe. (S8 Ep25/25)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Hersheypark: When Adam tells Beverly that he doesn't want her to chaperone the school trip to a theme park, she tries to manipulate him with 'guilt letters'. (S6 Ep4)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Mister Knifey-Hands: Beverly's not happy when Jackie's parents let Adam watch A Nightmare on Elm Street. Erica hangs out at her old high school. (S6 Ep5)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: A Year of Birthdays: As the birth of Haley and Dylan's twins approaches, the family look back at how each of them celebrated their birthdays this past year. (S10 Ep22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: New Kids on the Block: Haley is determined to follow the advice in her parenting books with the twins, but Phil and Claire think their old methods are better. (S11 Ep1)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Fugitive (Part 1/2): When a prison van crashes, loads of convicts escape and the squad must track them down. (S4 Ep11)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Fugitive (Part 2/2): Peralta must ask a surprising ally to help catch the only escaped prisoner who's still on the loose. (S4 Ep12)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Homr: When Homer loses all the family's money with an unwise investment, he becomes a human guinea pig to earn some cash - and that's when he becomes extremely intelligent... (S12 Ep9/21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Pokey Mom: Marge notices a prison inmate's artistic talent and helps him to get a job painting a mural at the school. But he clashes with Skinner. Michael Keaton guest stars. (S12 Ep10/21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Estranger Things: When Bart and Lisa lose interest in their only shared love, Marge worries they'll drift apart as they grow up. Cue a glimpse into the future. (S36 Ep18)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Marge-ian Chronicles: When Lisa signs up to participate in the future colonisation of Mars, Marge's attempt to use reverse psychology to discourage her goes badly wrong. (S27 Ep16/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off...
E4Plus1.uk.description: ...for Stand Up To Cancer: James Blunt, Alison Hammond, Alex Jones and Joe Sugg take on traybakes, a British staple and a biscuit scene of what they wanted to be when they grew up. (S3 Ep4)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Terminator Genisys
E4Plus1.uk.description: (2015) Sci-fi thriller with Arnold Schwarzenegger and Emilia Clarke. Part five of the franchise follows Sarah Connor in an alternate timeline to the previous movies, as she takes on Skynet.

Film4.uk.title: Blackberry
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Matt Johnson, Glenn Howerton and Jay Baruchel star in the frenetic, flabbergasting and mostly true story of the precipitous rise and fall of the once ubiquitous device.

Film4.uk.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Keanu Reeves returns for the third time as the supposedly retired hitman. Someone's put a contract on John Wick's head and only a mystic in Morocco can lift it.

Film4.uk.title: Journeyman
Film4.uk.description: (2018) Paddy Considine and Jodie Whittaker star in Considine's sobering drama about a boxer who wins his world championship bout, only to be left with a serious head injury. Violence.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Sea Wife
Film4.uk.description: (1957) Offbeat melodrama starring Richard Burton (as an RAF officer), Joan Collins (as a nun), Basil Sydney and Cy Grant, who end up on a life raft together after their ship is torpedoed.

Film4.uk.title: The Mark of Zorro
Film4.uk.description: (1940) Swashbuckling action-adventure starring Tyrone Power. An aristocrat dons his mask and cape to fight for the rights of the poor in 19th-century California. With Basil Rathbone.

Film4.uk.title: The Major and the Minor
Film4.uk.description: (1942) Ginger Rogers stars in this comedy of romantic misadventure. A woman poses as a girl to get a cheap rail fare. But things get awkward when she falls for a man who helps her out.

Film4.uk.title: Drums Along the Mohawk
Film4.uk.description: (1939) John Ford western with Henry Fonda and Claudette Colbert. In 1776, a settler and his wife attempt to farm in the Mohawk Valley but face attacks from Native Americans and the English.

Film4.uk.title: Suffragette Interview Special
Film4.uk.description: Writer Abi Morgan, director Sarah Gavron and star Anne-Marie Duff talk about their powerful period political drama Suffragette.

Film4.uk.title: Suffragette
Film4.uk.description: (2015) Drama exploring the increasingly defiant campaign by British women for equality and the right to vote in the years before WWI. Starring Carey Mulligan and Meryl Streep.

Film4.uk.title: Ambulance
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Michael Bay's high-octane thriller with Jake Gyllenhaal. After a bodged heist, two brothers try to evade the LAPD in an ambulance, while a paramedic operates on a cop in the back.

Film4.uk.title: Boss Level
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Groundhog day shoot 'em up with Frank Grillo, Naomi Watts and Mel Gibson. Ray gets killed every day. Can he escape by unravelling the mystery of why a bunch of people want him dead?

Film4.uk.title: Proxima
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Sci-fi drama starring Eva Green as an astronaut who gets the mission she's always dreamed of, but faces a tug-of-love between her personal and professional life.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Arizona Raiders
Film4.uk.description: (1965) William Whitney's brutal western. Two former Confederate rebels are offered their freedom if they can track, catch or even kill their former gang mates. Starring Audie Murphy.

Film4.uk.title: Leave Her to Heaven
Film4.uk.description: (1945) Riveting film noir melodrama starring Oscar-nominated Gene Tierney as an irredeemably evil, possessive woman who resorts to murder to keep her husband (Cornel Wilde) with her.

Film4.uk.title: The Son of Robin Hood
Film4.uk.description: (1958) Swashbuckling adventure starring June Laverick. Robin Hood is dead and his band of followers seek a worthy new leader. And they get one who exceeds all their expectations.

Film4.uk.title: The Lost World
Film4.uk.description: (1960) Fantasy adventure. Claude Rains plays a scientist who, convinced that dinosaurs still roam the earth, sets off into the Amazon to find them. Based on Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's novel.

Film4.uk.title: Independence Day: Resurgence
Film4.uk.description: (2016) Sci-fi blockbuster sequel starring Jeff Goldblum and Liam Hemsworth. Twenty years after Earth repelled a devastating alien invasion, the extraterrestrials return to finish the job.

Film4.uk.title: Django Unchained Interview Special
Film4.uk.description: Director Quentin Tarantino and stars Samuel L Jackson, Christoph Waltz, Jamie Foxx and Kerry Washington talk about making the western adventure set against a backdrop of slavery.

Film4.uk.title: Django Unchained
Film4.uk.description: (2012) Quentin Tarantino's darkly comic, award-laden western with Jamie Foxx, Christopher Waltz, Leonardo DiCaprio and Samuel L Jackson. A freed slave searches for his wife... and revenge.

Film4.uk.title: The Kid Detective
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Dark Adam Brody comedy. Abe was a childhood detecting prodigy but is now a failing PI. But when a local boy is killed Abe gets the case. Things are looking up (for Abe, not the boy).

Film4.uk.title: Thief
Film4.uk.description: (1971) Crime thriller starring Richard Crenna. A recently paroled thief must do one last job to pay off old debts. But can he get away with it and build a life with his new girlfriend?

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Patton
Film4.uk.description: (1970) Multi-Oscar-winning, fact-based, Second World War drama starring George C Scott, who gives a vivid portrait of the famously straight-talking US commander General George Patton.

Film4.uk.title: Ride Lonesome
Film4.uk.description: (1959) Western. Randolph Scott plays a bounty hunter who has unfinished business with the brother of his latest target. But his quest for revenge looks like it could be undermined.

Film4.uk.title: Bridge of Spies Interview Special
Film4.uk.description: Director Steven Spielberg and stars Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance talk about making their Cold War espionage drama.

Film4.uk.title: Twelve O'Clock High
Film4.uk.description: (1949) World War II drama starring Gregory Peck as a US general who must treat a demoralised bomber squadron severely to restore discipline. With Oscar-winning support from Dean Jagger.

Film4.uk.title: Mrs Doubtfire
Film4.uk.description: (1993) Comedy starring Robin Williams and Sally Field. A struggling actor dresses as a woman to get his estranged wife to hire him as a housekeeper, so he can spend more time with his kids.

Film4.uk.title: The Creator
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Sci-fi extravaganza starring John David Washington. An undercover operative must destroy a superweapon in a war against AI. But the superweapon looks like a little girl.

Film4.uk.title: The Witch: Part 2 - The Other One

UAndWPlus1.uk.description: Property renovation series hosted by Drew and Jonathan Scott. A couple searches for their dream home, but first must agree on the right location. S5 Ep19

UAndWPlus1.uk.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
UAndWPlus1.uk.description: Hessle: The DIY SOS team and hundreds of kind volunteers step up to help the recently widowed and wheelchair-bound Darren and his three sons. S30 Ep1

UAndWPlus1.uk.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
UAndWPlus1.uk.description: Crumble's Big Adventure: Pete meets Staffy Boxer Cross Crumble, who's been at the centre in Basildon for over three years, stuck without a foster or permanent home in sight. S3 Ep5

UAndWPlus1.uk.title: Inside the Ambulance
UAndWPlus1.uk.description: An asthmatic deteriorates rapidly in the ambulance, and the crews are called to a 30-year-old car that's been driven into a wall by a 90-year-old driver. S10 Ep4

UAndWPlus1.uk.title: 999 Rescue Squad
UAndWPlus1.uk.description: Reality series following the work of Yorkshire Hazardous Area Response Team. The team try to seal a major chemical spill and help a teenager who fell down a chimney. S1 Ep2

UAndWPlus1.uk.title: 999 Rescue Squad
UAndWPlus1.uk.description: Reality series following Yorkshire Ambulance Service's Hazardous Area Response Team. In this edition the team race to save a man who has been shot outside a mosque. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Navy Ambo/Plas/Victor/Viscount/Lorry: Paul hits the road to collect an old navy ambulance that served its time as a holiday camper. S9 Ep12

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Manta/Berlinetta/TR7/BSA Bike: Dave travels to Bedale to extract a barn find - a 1984 Manta GTE which hasn't seen the light of day in thirty years. S9 Ep13

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Abandoned Engineering
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Tunnel of Terrors: Exploring a military strong-hold in the Philippines, a facility that spawned an American sporting great, and an English relic that hosted a cinematic sensation. S9 Ep4

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Abandoned Engineering
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Apocalyptic Skyscraper: Exploring a ruined castle above a German village, a rural town in Idaho, a futuristic skyscraper in Johannesburg and a fantasy world outside of Buenos Aires. S9 Ep5

UAndYesterday.uk.title: War Factories
UAndYesterday.uk.description: General Motors: How the Americans, once they were provoked into war, out-produced the rest of the world so quickly and by such a huge margin, including the likes of General Motors. S1 Ep4

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Teleshopping
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Montreal to Ottawa: In Montreal, Michael Portillo learns how French and British colonial roots have influenced the city. In Ottawa, the former politician visits the country's parliament. S3 Ep9

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Thousand Islands to Toronto: Michael Portillo takes to the water for a nautical journey through the Thousand Islands, before his railway journey across Canada concludes in Toronto. S3 Ep10

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Ford Granada/Toyota Hilux: Derek navigates the dry stone walls of the Peak District to collect a very original 1988 Opel Manta. Plus, Dave deals with a Ford Granada rally support vehicle. S6 Ep4

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Bedford Bus/Triumph TR7: Derek has a three-hour drive in a 1960s bus that arrived in the UK after a life in the sun. Dave takes a Triumph TR7 convertible to auction. S6 Ep5

UAndYesterday.uk.title: War Factories
UAndYesterday.uk.description: US Aviation: Henry Ford's plan, with the help of Albert Kahn, to build a giant factory in Michigan, covering 3.5million sq ft and including an aircraft production line half a mile in length. S1 Ep5

UAndYesterday.uk.title: The Great War In Numbers
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Total War: Learn more about the 'war to end all wars' through illuminating and often shocking statistics. After 1916, the imperial powers redoubled their efforts to win the war. S1 Ep5

UAndYesterday.uk.description: Cardiff Castle 1: Fiona Bruce presents from Cardiff Castle, where items brought in to be valued include a jug given as a love token, an early Hockney print, and a signed Elgar score. S40 Ep16

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Antiques Roadshow
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Minehead Railway Station 2: Fiona Bruce presents from Minehead Railway Station, where items brought in include a chair thought to have once belonged to Henry VIII. S40 Ep17

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Buses/Ladyline/Norton Jubilee: Derek's got his work cut out collecting a huge haul that includes two Bentleys, a Daimler and a traditional Bowtop caravan. S10 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Merc/Unicycle/Sinclair C5/Golf/AWO: Dave has to extricate a VW Golf from a garden that has grown up around it. S10 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Abandoned Engineering
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Experiments of War: Exploring a crumbling dam hidden in the Welsh valleys, a quaint outpost on a paradise island, and a mastery of ancient engineering that brought life to the planes of Mexico. S9 Ep8

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Abandoned Engineering
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Alien Contact: Exploring a complex in Georgia pointing into deep space that almost discovered a signal from aliens. S9 Ep10

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Occupied Territories: The sabotaging efforts of Peugeot in Nazi-occupied France, where the bosses and workers cooperated with the Resistance to hinder the Nazis' use of military vehicles. S1 Ep6

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Skagway to Vancouver: Michael Portillo crosses over from Alaska to Canada, where he visits the home of the Vancouver Giants and tries his hand at ice hockey. S4 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Vancouver Island to Kamloops: Michael Portillo explores British Columbia, discovering how two superpowers nearly came to war over a pig. S4 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: BMW Z4 Batmobile/Ford Army Jeep: Derek is picking up two expertly crafted Batmobile replicas in the home counties and Dave can't control his enthusiasm for a Ford US wartime jeep. S6 Ep8

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Burlington Arrow/Vauxhall Cresta: Paul is picking up a stunning 1961 Vauxhall Cresta, inspired by American design, the car changed the face of British motoring. S6 Ep9

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: US Ships: The story of America's 'Liberty Ships', which were produced in incredible numbers and became known as the Model T Fords of the ocean. S1 Ep7

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: War Factories
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: The Story of the Machine Gun: Hiram Maxim developed the world's first fully automatic machine gun, but it weighed a whopping 136 lbs - until British company Vickers adapted the design. S3 Ep6

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Helmingham Hall 3: The team return to Helmingham Hall in Suffolk, where items include a sapphire ring and a sketch by founder of the Boy Scouts and Girl Guides Robert Baden-Powell. S40 Ep21
